seo.title: Our Ludlow Store | Savery's of Broadway — Luxury Interior Design
seo.description: Visit Savery's of Broadway in Ludlow — our carefully curated interiors store at 1 Tower Street, in the heart of this historic market town. Fabrics, furnishings & design consultations.

intro.heading: A destination for exceptional interiors
paragraphs: Nestled in the heart of one of England's finest market towns, our Ludlow store brings the Savery's experience to the Welsh Marches. Set within a beautifully appointed space on Tower Street, it's a place to explore our curated collection of fabrics, wallpapers, furniture, and decorative pieces — each chosen to reflect the quality and craftsmanship that defines everything we do.
Whether you're embarking on a full renovation or searching for that one perfect finishing touch, our Ludlow team is on hand to guide, inspire, and bring your vision to life.

features.title: Fabric Library
features.description: Browse an extensive collection of the finest fabrics from leading British and European houses — available to view, touch, and take away as samples.

features.title: Wallpapers & Finishes
features.description: From hand-printed wallpapers to artisan paint finishes, discover the materials that bring walls to life with character and depth.

features.title: Furniture & Pieces
features.description: A changing selection of furniture, lighting, and decorative accessories — sourced for quality, beauty, and that unmistakable sense of place.

features.title: Design Consultations
features.description: Book a one-to-one consultation with our team to discuss your project. Whether it's a single room or an entire property, we're here to help.

features.title: Curtain & Soft Furnishings
features.description: All our curtains and soft furnishings are made in-house at our own workroom — ensuring impeccable quality and a truly bespoke result.

features.title: Gifts & Home
features.description: Thoughtfully chosen candles, ceramics, and homeware — perfect for gifting or adding a considered finishing touch to any room.

visitUs.heading: Visit us in Ludlow
visitUs.parking: Castle Square car park is a short walk away
